rationale: All four events show WMIC.exe invoked by the Amazon SSM Agent worker (PID 616) under NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM to collect basic system inventory: DNS hostname (EV-001), domain membership (EV-002), OS caption (EV-003), and OS version (A0). This is a well-known, legitimate behavior of the AWS Systems Manager agent performing instance inventory or health checks. The WMIC binary hashes are consistent across all events and match the expected system binary; no anomalous parent, lateral movement indicators, network connections, or payload delivery is evidenced. No counter-evidence of compromise is present.
